plan.description: Find all files in src/ and read them. Find every reference to UserService (class name, imports, variable names, file name).
Rename UserService class to AccountService everywhere. Also rename the file from UserService.ts to AccountService.ts — create the new file and update all imports.
Verify the rename is complete: grep for any remaining 'UserService' references. Record findings in state.

initialState.task: Rename UserService to AccountService across the entire codebase, including the filename.
